Extract models results (cross-validation, train, test and timing)

extract_models_results.Rd

This function extracts the results from fitted machine learning models, including cross-validation metrics, training and test metrics, and timing information. It takes a list of fitted models and the corresponding training and test datasets, and returns a structured list containing the extracted results for each model. The function relies on internal helper functions to extract the relevant metrics and confusion matrices for both training and test datasets, as well as the cross-validation results.

Usage

extract_models_results(
  models_to_run,
  results_models,
  expression_train,
  expression_test,
  target_var
)

Arguments

models_to_run

Vector of models names.

results_models

List of fitted models.

expression_train

Training data.

expression_test

Test data.

target_var

Name of the target variable.

Value

A list containing the extracted results for each model, including cross-validation metrics, training and test metrics, confusion matrices, misclassified samples, and timing information.
